== Notes for [[Item:Q77846|Q77846]] ==

D: I84756

Name: Aerobindus of Roman Empire

Given Name: Aerobindus

Surname: of Roman Empire

Sex: M

_UID: FA1875A0E3C6A546AA4BB04BD66F1AE4EE4D

Change Date: 11 Aug 2005

Birth: ABT 460

Death: 506

Marriage 1 Anicia Juliana Olybrius b: ABT 467

Married:

Children

Olybrius of Roman Empire b: ABT 487

Forrás / Source:

http://wc.rootsweb.ancestry.com/cgi-bin/igm.cgi?op=GET&db=jdp-fam&id=I84756

Flavius Areobindus Dagalaiphus

From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Jump to: navigation, search

Flavius Areobindus Dagalaiphus (ca 460 - 546) was Magister Militum from 503 to 504 and Roman Consul in 506. He was a son of Flavius Dagalaiphus (ca 430 - aft. 461), Roman Consul in 461, and wife Godisthea (b. ca 445).

He married in 479 Anicia Juliana (Constantinople, 462 - 527/528), daughter of Emperor Olybrius and wife Placidia, and had issue:

Areobindus (b. ca 485), a Pagan, married to Georgia and had:

Probus (ca 510 - 542), married to Aviena (b. ca 520), daughter of Rufius Magnus Faustus Avienus (ca 485 - 534/545), Roman Consul in 502, and wife Barbara (b. ca 495), and had issue

Flavius Anicius Olybrius Iunior (ca 480 - aft. 524/aft. 527), Roman Consul in 491

Forrás / Source:

http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Flavius_Areobindus_Dagalaiphus

Gothic general

"AREOBINDUS"; CONSUL 506

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q642469 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000007151145957

[[Category:Possibly derived from wikipedia]]
[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
